economic_notes: Band receives major portion of revenues from Indigenous Services Canada. Goodfish Business Corporation deferred contribution of $800,010 noted. COVID-19 pandemic declared in March 2020 with uncertain impact on operations.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2020 not 2024. Net financial position is net debt of $3,479,552. Deferred contributions split between own-source ($2,459,473) and government funding ($6,604,313). Excess of revenue over expenditures on the Statement of Financial Activities shows $2,208,172 before trust fund adjustments; the Statement of Change in Net Financial Assets shows $2,383,288 including trust fund interest of $175,116. Capital funding from ISC of $6,761,179 included as other revenue. Prior year figures from comparative columns used for prior_ fields. No schedule of remuneration provided. COVID-19 subsequent event disclosed. Landfill closure liability of $240,000 included in accounts payable.
